user.title: Add a Storm Risk location
user.description: Storm Risk polls the free Open-Meteo API for convective forecast data. Enter a name and the coordinates to monitor. Add the integration again to track additional locations.

data_description.name: A friendly name for this location (e.g. Home, Work).
data_description.location: Drag the marker to the point you want to monitor. Defaults to your Home Assistant location.

abort.already_configured: A Storm Risk location with these coordinates already exists.

init.title: Storm Risk scoring
init.description: Tune the 0-100 ingredients score. Each ingredient contributes up to 33 points. Lower divisors and a higher dew-point multiplier make the score more sensitive. Thresholds set where each interpretation band begins and must increase: quiet < watch < loaded < severe.

data_description.cape_gate: CAPE (J/kg) at which the CIN score reaches full weight; below it CIN is scaled down, so zero CAPE scores zero CIN. Set 0 to disable. Default 100.
data_description.dew_point_floor: Fraction of the dew-point score kept when there is no CAPE (it's gated by CAPE like CIN, but only down to this floor). 1 = ungated, 0 = fully gated. Default 0.5.
data_description.threshold_quiet: Score at or above which the band becomes 'Quiet'. Default 25.
data_description.threshold_watch: Score at or above which the band becomes 'Watch'. Default 45.
data_description.threshold_loaded: Score at or above which the band becomes 'Loaded'. Default 65.
data_description.threshold_severe: Score at or above which the band becomes 'Severe'. Default 85.

error.thresholds_not_ascending: Thresholds must increase: quiet < watch < loaded < severe.
